languages.text: "Совпадение, а не "судьба", примитивное существо. Тебе следует быть благодарнее законам вероятности за то, что мы не остались врагами — для тебя это закончилось бы катастрофой".

traits.locale_text: "Совпадение, а не "судьба", примитивное существо. Тебе следует быть благодарнее законам вероятности за то, что мы не остались врагами — для тебя это закончилось бы катастрофой".

languages.text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."
languages.original_text: "Совпадение, а не "судьба", примитивное существо. Тебе следует быть благодарнее законам вероятности за то, что мы не остались врагами — для тебя это закончилось бы катастрофой".

traits.locale_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."
"Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."
"Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

languages.text: “是巧合，不是‘命运’，原始生物。你应该感激概率法则，让我们没有继续为敌，不然你将面临灭顶之灾。”
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: “是巧合，不是‘命运’，原始生物。你应该感激概率法则，让我们没有继续为敌，不然你将面临灭顶之灾。”

languages.text: «Es coincidencia, no "destino", criatura primitiva. Deberías agradecer a las leyes de la probabilidad el que nuestra enemistad haya terminado. Habría sido un desastre para ti».
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: «Es coincidencia, no "destino", criatura primitiva. Deberías agradecer a las leyes de la probabilidad el que nuestra enemistad haya terminado. Habría sido un desastre para ti».

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'une coïncidence, et non d'un coup du sort, primitive créature. Vous devriez remercier les lois de la probabilité qui nous ont permis de ne pas rester ennemis. Le contraire aurait été catastrophique pour vous. »
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'agit d'une coïncidence, et non d'un coup du sort, primitive créature. Vous devriez remercier les lois de la probabilité qui nous ont permis de ne pas rester ennemis. Le contraire aurait été catastrophique pour vous. »

languages.text: "Kader değil, tesadüf ilkel yaratık. Düşman olarak kalmadığımız için olasılık yasalarına daha çok minnettar olmalısın. Sonucu senin için felaket olurdu."
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: "Kader değil, tesadüf ilkel yaratık. Düşman olarak kalmadığımız için olasılık yasalarına daha çok minnettar olmalısın. Sonucu senin için felaket olurdu."

languages.text: "Zufall, nicht 'Schicksal', du primitive Kreatur. Du solltest den Gesetzen der Wahrscheinlichkeit dankbar sein, dass wir keine Feinde geblieben sind ... das wäre für dich in einer Katastrophe geendet."
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: "Zufall, nicht 'Schicksal', du primitive Kreatur. Du solltest den Gesetzen der Wahrscheinlichkeit dankbar sein, dass wir keine Feinde geblieben sind ... das wäre für dich in einer Katastrophe geendet."

languages.text: 「偶然だ、運命ではない。お前のような原始的な生き物には感謝すべきだ。確率の法則のおかげで敵対関係を解消できたのだ。お前が敵対関係を続けたならば、災難に遭っていただろう。」
languages.original_text: "Coincidence, not 'fate,' you primitive creature. You should be more grateful to the laws of probability that we did not remain enemies — it would have ended in disaster for you."

traits.locale_text: 「偶然だ、運命ではない。お前のような原始的な生き物には感謝すべきだ。確率の法則のおかげで敵対関係を解消できたのだ。お前が敵対関係を続けたならば、災難に遭っていただろう。」
